1440 Used cars in Delhi NCR

Used Cars in Delhi NCR

Spinny has a wide range of used cars for sale in Delhi NCR from top brands like Tata, Hyundai, Kia, Honda and Maruti-Suzuki, with prices starting at Rs. 1.74 Lakh. You can also explore pre-owned luxury cars from popular brands like Mercedes-Benz, BMW, and Audi.

Browse top-rated models like Hyundai Creta, Maruti Suzuki Baleno, Kia Seltos, Honda Amaze and Tata Nexon with full inspection reports, real ownership history, and fixed no-negotiation prices. Used cars in Delhi NCR come in every budget. Used cars under Rs. 5 lakh are great for first-time buyers and daily city driving, while second hand cars under Rs. 10 lakh give you bigger, better-equipped SUVs and sedans like the used Kia Seltos and pre-owned Honda City.

Whether you want a second hand hatchback, a sedan, or an SUV, Spinny makes it easy to find the right car. Every car is fully inspected and Spinny Assured and comes with a 5-day money-back guarantee and up to a 3-year warranty. Check used car prices in Delhi NCR, see real photos and specs, and book a test drive online or at your nearest Spinny Car Hub in Dwarka.

With more than 1418 second-hand cars in Delhi NCR to choose from, you're just a few clicks away from your perfect 2nd hand car in Delhi. In the last seven days, 621 freshly listed used cars have been added to Spinny Delhi NCR's inventory, with Maruti Suzuki dominating the additions. The Maruti Suzuki Baleno stood out as the most sought-after model among buyers.

Want to upgrade? You can also sell your car online with Spinny for the best price. Try the Spinny car valuation tool and get the best quote for your old car in Delhi.

    More about Spinny

    Spinny is the most trusted way of buying and selling used cars. Choose from over 10K fully inspected second-hand car models. Select online and book a test drive at your home or at a Spinny Car Hub near you. Get a no-questions-asked* 5-day money back guarantee and a free one-year comprehensive service warranty with Assured Resale Value on every Spinny car.
